scripts.server:dev: concurrently -n SERVER -c blue "npm --prefix server run start:dev"
scripts.client:dev: concurrently -n CLIENT -c green "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.start:build: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run server:build" "npm run client:build"
scripts.db:build: concurrently -n DATABASE -c blue "npm --prefix server run db:build && npm --prefix server run db:seed"
